title: Get Developer Access to FC Sandbox for Grouping Issue Replication
description: Provision developer access to a Financial Cloud (FC) Salesforce sandbox environment so the development team can replicate and debug a grouping issue reported by a customer. This access enables testing against a representative Salesforce org configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Developers have login access to the FC Salesforce sandbox
Sandbox environment contains the data needed to replicate the grouping issue
Access is provisioned for both Waqar and Balaji
implementation_notes: FC sandbox access needed to replicate a customer-reported grouping issue in an environment that mirrors their Salesforce configuration.
